text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho and first G1 race of the
senior year has arrived and will serve as the stage
for Ryan's fierce battle with McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is aiming to fulfill her long-held dream,
while Mejiro Ryan is looking to stop her and
prove her own true worth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither competitor is willing to concede their
goals in the race that begins.
